# Oodleforge
An ultra-fast, multi-threaded Oodle archive precompressor.

## Core Architecture
- main.cpp: Entry point, argument parsing, space-allocation checks.
- scan.cpp: Sliding window scanner, O(log N) binary search for block lengths.
- reconstruct.cpp: AES re-encryption, 64MB async double-buffered disk ring writer.

## Key Subsystems
- FastStreamWriter: Asymmetric thread pipeline preventing disk thrashing.
- TryMatchBlock: thread_local buffer optimization with reader-writer locks.
